items.title: France, UK and Spain see record temperatures as heatwave grips western Europe
items.summary: Tens of millions of people are grappling with punishing temperatures, which have led to red heat alerts across the continent.

items.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
items.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.

items.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
items.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 北京表態！王毅：盡快恢復荷姆茲海峽通航
items.summary: 中國官媒新華社24日證實，中國外交部長王毅呼籲儘早恢復荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）正常通行，以協助確保全球產業鏈與供應鏈穩定。王毅強調，有關荷姆茲海峽的安排，必...…

items.title: 日本岩手縣外海發生規模6.9強震 青森縣測得震度「6強」
items.summary: 日本岩手縣外海於當地時間今早7點30分發生規模6.9強震，測得最大震度為「6強」，日本氣象廳表示，目前並無海嘯風險。  根據日本氣象廳觀測資料，這起規模6.9地震發生在岩手縣...…

items.title: 伊朗戰爭惹黨內反彈！川普與共和黨參議員爆激烈口角
items.summary: 美國總統川普（Donald Trump）24日在一場與共和黨議員舉行的閉門會議中，因伊朗戰爭議題遭到黨內人士直接批評。就在會議結束不久後，川普政府向國會提出數百億美元追加預算，以...…
